scope: Saga Edition Core Rulebook feats only. This audit separates implementation presence from implementation correctness.
generatedFrom: phase8 feat catalog metadata plus current repository implementation markers; source benefit text is preserved as short descriptions for review.
rules: A feat is not implemented correctly just because it exists in the catalog.
Action-option feats must expose an action/toggle/prompt and apply the correct contextual math; they must not be collapsed into flat passive bonuses.
Scoped feats must preserve their selected skill, weapon, armor, or Force-power choice.
Manual/procedure feats are correct only when explicitly metadata/manual and excluded from static sheet math.
Source-review feats are not implementation failures; they are intentionally withheld from automation until exact timing/target rules are verified.

entries.name: Advanced Melee Weapon Proficiency

entries.name: Cleave
